Someone traced IOG's genesis ADA across 620 epochs. - 4,682 credentials. 1,527 pools. 139.8M ₳ in staking rewards. - 43 multi-pool operators captured 22.7% of the ADA. Earned 33.5M ₳. And 59% of that ADA sits governance-inert — no DRep, no vote, no voice. - 125.2M ₳ already https://t.co/3kfMGrmQYz

Honestly I have no clue how things will drastically change after all these. Just treat it as an exciting early innovation worth watching. Value will come if/when dApps, liquidity, and daily usage follow the tech. https://t.co/xfZyB6ew0h
